languages.original_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

languages.text: "Ты говоришь загадками, кровавая весталка. Но я чую в твоих словах дух правды".
"You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."
languages.original_text: "Ты говоришь загадками, кровавая весталка. Но я чую в твоих словах дух правды".

traits.locale_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."
"You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."
"You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

languages.text: 「あなたは謎めいた言葉で話す、血の予言者。しかし、あなたの言葉には真実の霊が感じられる」
languages.original_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは謎めいた言葉で話す、血の予言者。しかし、あなたの言葉には真実の霊が感じられる。」

languages.text: « Vous parlez par énigmes, augure de sang, mais je perçois l'esprit de la vérité dans ce que vous avancez. »
languages.original_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

traits.locale_text: « Vous parlez par énigmes, augure de sang, mais je perçois l'esprit de la vérité dans ce que vous avancez. »

languages.text: "Ihr sprecht in Rätseln, Blutwahrsagerin. Aber ich erkenne einen Funken Wahrheit in Euren Worten."
languages.original_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr sprecht in Rätseln, Blutwahrsagerin. Aber ich erkenne einen Funken Wahrheit in Euren Worten."

languages.text: "Bilmecelerle konuşuyorsun kan kâhini. Fakat söylediklerinde hakikat ruhunun kokusunu alabiliyorum."
languages.original_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

traits.locale_text: "Bilmecelerle konuşuyorsun kan kâhini. Fakat söylediklerinde hakikat ruhunun kokusunu alabiliyorum."

languages.text: «Habla de un modo enigmático, vidente de sangre, pero capto el olor de la verdad en sus palabras».
languages.original_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

traits.locale_text: «Habla de un modo enigmático, vidente de sangre, pero capto el olor de la verdad en sus palabras».

languages.text: “你说话总像在打哑谜，鲜血占卜师。但我能嗅出你话中真知灼见的气味。”
languages.original_text: "You speak in riddles, blood scryer. But I can scent the spirit of truth in what you say."

traits.locale_text: “你说话总像在打哑谜，鲜血占卜师。但我能嗅出你话中真知灼见的气味。”
